MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS AHMAD ALAYDI, WEILIANG CHEN, LATONYA CLARK and AFI CRECY's Motion To Compel The Continued Deposition Of The Person Most Knowledgeable For Defendant Mccormack Baron Management, Inc., And The Deposition Of The Person Most Knowledgeable For Defendant Plaza East Associates, L.P; Request For Order Awarding Monetary Sanctions:

Off calendar pursuant to notice of withdrawal by moving parties dated August 22, 2022.

Judge Pro Tem: William Lynn, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Discovery Responses Without Objections By Defendants Plaza East Associates Lp And Mccormack Baron Management, Inc.
Off Calendar Dec-16-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Joshua Ezrin, Esq. (415.577.2558; josh@ezrinlaw.com) of Ezrin Law for Plaintiffs.
Matthew Wisinski, Esq. (415.524.4300; mwisinski@murchisonlaw.com) of Murchison & Cumming, LLP for Defendants (audio only).

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

PLAINTIFFS AHMAD ALAYDI, WEILIANG CHEN and LATONYA CLARK's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses Without Objections By Defendants Plaza East Associates LP And McCormack Baron Management, Inc.:
Plaintiffs' motion is granted. Defendants shall answer the interrogatories without objection and shall pay sanctions of $2,060 no later than January 31, 2022.

Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
